violations.text: Inspector observed paper towel dispenser and soap dispenser above mop sink. A sink used for FOOD preparation or UTENSIL washing, or a service sink or curbed cleaning facility used for the disposal of mop water or similar wastes, may not be provided with handwashing aids. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The outside dumpster was observed overflowing. REFUSE, recyclables, and returnables shall be removed from the PREMISES at a frequency that will minimize the development of objectionable odors and other conditions that attract or harbor insects and rodents. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
